label: Provider
definition: A natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body that develops an AI system or a general-purpose AI model or that has an AI system or a general-purpose AI model developed and places it on the market or puts the AI system into service under its own name or trademark, whether for payment or free of charge
note: A deployer who modifies a high-risk AI system's intended purpose becomes a provider and must fulfill provider obligations (Art. 25).

label: Deployer
definition: A natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body that uses an AI system under its authority except where the AI system is used in the course of a personal non-professional activity

label: Importer
definition: A natural or legal person established or located in the Union that places on the market an AI system that bears the name or trademark of a natural or legal person established in a third country

label: Distributor
definition: A natural or legal person in the supply chain, other than the provider or the importer, that makes an AI system available on the Union market

label: Authorised Representative
definition: A natural or legal person located or established in the Union who has received and accepted a written mandate from a provider of an AI system or a general-purpose AI model to, respectively, perform and carry out on its behalf the obligations and procedures established by this Regulation

label: Product Manufacturer
definition: A manufacturer placing on the market or putting into service an AI system together with their product and under their own name or trademark — treated as provider of the AI system

label: Notified Body
definition: A conformity assessment body designated by a notifying authority to carry out third-party conformity assessment for high-risk AI systems
responsibilities: Conduct conformity assessment procedures (Annex VI or VII)
Issue, suspend, withdraw, or restrict conformity assessment certificates
Maintain confidentiality of commercially sensitive information
Report to notifying authority and AI Office

label: National Competent Authority
definition: A notifying authority and/or market surveillance authority designated by each Member State to supervise the application and implementation of this Regulation
responsibilities: Cooperation with EU AI Office and other national authorities

label: EU AI Office
definition: The Commission's function responsible for implementation, monitoring, and supervision of AI systems — particularly GPAI models — established within the Commission structure
responsibilities: Supervision of GPAI models and systemic risk models
Maintaining EU database of high-risk AI systems (Art. 71)
Monitoring AI developments and issuing guidance
